_comment: splits[]:  { symbol, effectiveDate: yyyy-MM-dd, factor: decimal, description? }
renames[]: { oldSymbol, newSymbol, effectiveDate: yyyy-MM-dd, description? }
- Ticker renames / symbol remaps (chained hops supported)
Out of scope: dividends, spin-offs, mergers, acquisitions at constituent level,
Defaults: both arrays empty. The demo posture ships with no corp-actions so
the basket pipeline runs through the adjustment layer as a no-op.
Operators can override the path via ReferenceData:CorporateActions:File:Path
